build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 80, 2)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=2).rect(40, 60).extrude(10)
STEP 4: Create slot for phone — .faces("<X").workplane(centered=(True, False)).rect(10, 50).cutThruAll()
STEP 5: Add rubber feet holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().circle(2).centered(True, True).repeat([(-30, -40), (-30, 40), (30, -40), (30, 40)]).cutThruAll()
